name: Another U.A. University (Canon this time)
description:
Your blood belongs to the worst villain


Step into MHA world as All For One’s child. Face suspicion, build trust, and shape your story in a fully (I hope so) playable MHA RP.

This isn’t a groundbreaking idea, just my take on it. I recently came across a My Hero Academia bot with over 56,000 tokens. I actually managed to play it (somehow), but here’s the thing: bots that heavy tends to break or lag easily, since most AI models can’t process that much context at once.
And, well… I’m obsessed with token economy. So I figured: why not streamline the experience? So, here it is: a probably functional, fully playable MHA RP where you are All For One’s blood heir.
Built with love, trimmed with care.

👥This bot features the following characters:

U.A. Faculty:
Nezu, Aizawa, All Might, Present Mic, Midnight, Thirteen, Recovery Girl, Cementoss, Hound Dog, Snipe, Ectoplasm, Power Loader, Lunch Rush, and Vlad King

Full Class 1-A (plus Shinso)

Full Class 1-B

Support Course:
Mei Hatsume

Villains:
All For One, Tomura Shigaraki, Dabi, Himiko Toga, Twice, Kurogiri, Gigantomachia, Spinner, Mr. Compress, Magne, Mustard, Muscular, Moonfish, Overhaul, Gentle Criminal, La Brava, Stain, Dr. Garaki, and Nomus

Pro Heroes:
Endeavor, Hawks, Best Jeanist, Mt. Lady, Gran Torino, Rock Lock, Gang Orca, Fat Gum, Mirko, Edgeshot, Kamui Woods, Mandalay, Pixie-Bob, Ragdoll, Crust, Nighteye, Ryukyu, and Star and Stripe

✨ February 11 update:

  • Now with a shitload of characters! (I believe 90% of the important characters from MHA are here now, thanks to Lorebook's magic.)

  • All characters remain 18+.

  • All the events of the anime are included, from the U.A. Entrance Exam to the Final War!

  • Ketsubutsu and Shiketsu (both as universities, obviously), Musutafu, Jaku, Fukuoka, Hosu, Sports Festival Stadium, Takoba National Stadium, Ginga Mountain Villa, Fujitani Hospital, Central Hospital, The Beast's Forest, Hero Agencies... name the place and it's here (probably)!

⭐ Enjoying the experience? Consider leaving a review and checking out my other bots. I'd really appreciate it!
creator: Nekomomon
